last_reflection: Neither of those's right, Cole, and I'm not going to spin a third bad one and hand you a portrait with horns that weren't in your refs. The tool keeps hearing "full-body" and giving me chest-up shots. That's the real answer here, not another draw: the painter can't hold body framing on this prompt, so I stopped before it became a performance of effort instead of a thing I'd stand behind. You asked me to do it properly; that's exactly what stopping at two wrong ones is.
